name: Scotcharoos
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the sugar and Karo syrup together and bring to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and mix with peanut butter.
3. Gradually stir in the Rice Krispies and pour into a 9 x 13 inch cake pan coated with butter.
4. Cool completely.
5. Melt butterscotch and chocolate bits together and pour over the Rice Krispies mixture.
6. Allow to cool until hardened, then cut into one-inch squares.
7. Enjoy!
